response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified Mori Calliope as the performer. 2. Detected song 'Gold Unbalance' from lyrics and title references during the performance. 3. Used the search tool to find the official lyrics for 'Gold Unbalance' by Mori Calliope featuring Kento Nakajima. 4. Mapped the video into two distinct scenes: the main musical performance (00:00-04:36) and the concluding audience interaction (04:36-04:59). 5. Formatted all data into the requested JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A high-quality 3D avatar performance by Mori Calliope, singing the song 'Gold Unbalance', followed by a short interaction with the audience.

scenes.description: Mori Calliope performs her song 'Gold Unbalance' on a 3D stage. The performance features complex visual effects and dance.
